title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 4: In the World of Men
description: Chapter 4 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 4 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: If a man can fast and cleanse his mind, he can enter the realm where all is one. The way of heaven and the way of man are far apart. To know what is of heaven and what is of man — this is to have arrived at the highest understanding.
